sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ رَجُلٌ حَكِيمٌ يَعِيشُ فِي قَرْيَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je jedan mudar čovjek koji je živio u malom selu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a wise man living in a small village.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ إِلَيْهِ شَابٌّ يَطْلُبُ نَصِيحَةً لِلنَّجَاحِ فِي الحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Došao mu je mladić tražeći savjet za uspjeh u životu.
sentences.translationEn: A young man came to him seeking advice for success in life.

sentences.translation: Mudrac reče: 'Znanje je lovina, a pisanje je njegov okov.'
sentences.translationEn: The wise man said: 'Knowledge is prey, and writing is its shackle.'

sentences.arabic: مَعْنَى هَذَا أَنَّ عَلَى الإِنْسَانِ أَنْ يَكْتُبَ مَا يَتَعَلَّمُهُ كَيْ لَا يَنْسَاهُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da čovjek treba zapisivati ono što nauči kako to ne bi zaboravio.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a person must write down what they learn so they don't forget it.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الشَّابُّ أَنَّ العَمَلَ وَالِاجْتِهَادَ هُمَا طَرِيقُ الوُصُولِ إِلَى الهَدَفِ.
sentences.translation: Mladić je naučio da su rad i trud put do ostvarenja cilja.
sentences.translationEn: The young man learned that work and diligence are the path to reaching one's goal.
